UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT GUO HE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NOVEMBER 13, 2012 IS QUASHED. PLAINTIFFS ARGUMENT HAT "IT IS IRRELEVANT IF DEFENDANT ACTUALLY KNEW THE PERSON WHO RECEIVED THE SERVICE ON HIS BEHALF" (OPPOSITION 3:27-4:2) IS NOT SUPPORTED BY ANY AUTHORITY AND IS IN DIRECT CONTRADICTION WITH CCP 415.20(B), WHICH ALLOWS SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON A "COMPETENT MEMBER OF THE HOUSEHOLD." MOTION IS OTHERWISE DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE CASE AT LEAST AS OF MARCH 4, 2013. DEFAULT WAS NOT TAKEN UNTIL AUGUST 2013. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To Jul-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sze-Hang Lo, Esq. of Shi Law Group, (415-831-3388), for Guo Wen He, Defendant and moving party.
Peter Kutrubes, Esq., Attorney at Law, (925-939-9600 x101), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Jacqueline Sau Cheung, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court clarifies and adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GUO HE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. Substitute service on November 13, 2012 is quashed. Plaintiffs argument hat "it is irrelevant if Defendant actually knew the person who received the service on his behalf" (Opposition 3:27-4:2) is not supported by any authority and is in direct contradiction with CCP 415.20(b), which allows substitute service on a "competent member of the household." Motion is otherwise denied. Defendant has actual notice of the case at least as of March 4, 2013. Default was not taken until August 2013. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Continued To Apr-04-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GUO HE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is transferred to Department 501 to be heard on April 4, 2014, at 9:30 a.m. Department 501 handles all landlord-tenant-lease-related matters pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
